# Media Models


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## MediaFile Dataclass

Data model representing a media file (audio or video) discovered by the
scanner. Contains both raw data (size in bytes, timestamp) and
pre-formatted strings for display.

### MediaFile

>  MediaFile (path:str, name:str, extension:str, size:int, size_str:str,
>                 modified:float, modified_str:str, media_type:str,
>                 directory:str)

*Represents a discovered media file for display and processing.*
